name: design-polish
description: Refine frontend/UI/UX work so it stops looking like generic AI output. Use for layout, typography, spacing, interaction polish, design system cleanup, and frontend visual audits across Claude, Codex, OpenCode, and Copilot.
codexLead: Recommended routing: `oabtw-codex design-polish "<target>"` when frontend output needs stronger UI/UX quality, not just correctness.
